title: Card Stacks Schema
description: Schema for cardstacks.json files containing card deck definitions

Id.description: Unique identifier for the card stack

DrawGroup.description: Group identifier for card drawing mechanics

CardIds.description: Comma-separated list of card IDs in the stack

PositionX.description: X coordinate position on the map

PositionY.description: Y coordinate position on the map

RevealLocation.description: Direction where cards are revealed when drawn (e.g., Up, Down, Left, Right)

Rotation.description: Rotation angle of the card stack in degrees

OwnerPlayerId.description: ID of the player who owns this card stack
